title: cyanea kahiliensis
intro: Cyanea kahiliensis, also known as Kahili's lobelia, is a flowering plant species native to Hawaii and is a member of the Lobelia family. The plant has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyanea kahiliensis include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis. Cyanea kahiliensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to the plant's potential toxicity.
